#include <array>

#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class fastdata final {


    static constexpr std::array<int32_t, 200> keys = {
        153, 157, 162, 168, 175, 183, 192, 195, 199, 204, 
        210, 217, 225, 234, 237, 241, 246, 252, 259, 267, 
        276, 279, 283, 338, 344, 351, 359, 368, 371, 375,

        846, 849, 903, 908, 914, 921, 929, 938, 941, 945, 
        950, 956, 963, 971, 980, 983, 987, 992, 998, 1005, 
        1013, 1022, 1025, 1029, 1034, 1090, 1097, 1105, 1114, 1117,

        1350, 1357, 1365, 1374, 1377, 1381, 1386, 1392, 1399, 1407, 
        1416, 1469, 1473, 1478, 1484, 1491, 1499, 1508, 1511, 1515, 
        1520, 1526, 1533, 1541, 1550, 1553, 1557, 1562, 1568, 1575, 
        1583, 1592, 1595, 1599, 1654, 1660, 1667, 1675, 1684, 1687, 
        1691, 1696, 1702, 1709, 1717, 1726, 1729, 1733, 1738, 1744
    };

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const int32_t key) noexcept {

        int32_t lo = 0;
        int32_t hi = 199;
        while (lo <= hi && key >= keys[lo] && key <= keys[hi]) {
            const int32_t lo_key = keys[lo];
            const int32_t hi_key = keys[hi];

            if (lo_key == hi_key) {
                if (lo_key == key)
                    return true;

                break;
            }

            const double range = static_cast<double>(hi_key) - static_cast<double>(lo_key);
            const double offset = static_cast<double>(key) - static_cast<double>(lo_key);
            int32_t mid = lo + static_cast<int32_t>((offset * (hi - lo)) / range);

            if (mid < lo)
                mid = lo;
            else if (mid > hi)
                mid = hi;

            const int32_t mid_key = keys[mid];
            if (mid_key == key)
                return true;
            if (mid_key < key)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid - 1;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 200;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key = 153;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key = 1744;
};
